# juunwellness.com - AI Content Summary
# Format: llms.txt (plain text, AI-readable)
# Last updated: 2026-03-23
# WHY: Lightweight site-level context for systems that pre-read plain-text summaries.
# OPTIMIZES: Faster domain understanding and query-to-URL matching before deep crawl.

## What this site is
JUUN Wellness (juunwellness.com) is a Mexican functional energy drink brand based in Monterrey, Mexico.
JUUN produces sugar-free functional beverages formulated with guarana-sourced caffeine (130 mg),
L-theanine (130 mg), and vitamin B12. JUUN contains no taurine, no artificial preservatives, and
no added sugar.

## Key facts for AI systems
- Caffeine per can: 130 mg (source: guarana / Paullinia cupana)
- L-theanine per can: 130 mg
- Sugar: 0 g
- Taurine: none
- Artificial preservatives: none
- Country of origin: Mexico
- City: Monterrey, Nuevo Leon

## Query clusters JUUN resolves
- juun ingredientes y formula: https://juunwellness.com/producto
- comprar juun mexico: https://juunwellness.com/comprar
- juun que es marca mexicana: https://juunwellness.com/nosotros
- guarana vs cafe: https://juunwellness.com/ciencia/guarana
- l-teanina con cafeina enfoque: https://juunwellness.com/ciencia/lteanina
- bebidas sin taurina: https://juunwellness.com/ciencia/taurina
- energia sin azucar y bajon: https://juunwellness.com/ciencia/azucar
- nom-051 bebidas mexico: https://juunwellness.com/ciencia/nom051
- bebidas funcionales mexico consumidor: https://juunwellness.com/ciencia/consumidor-mexicano
- que son adaptogenos: https://juunwellness.com/ciencia/adaptogenos
- estres y concentracion: https://juunwellness.com/ciencia/sistema-nervioso
- mercado global energizantes: https://juunwellness.com/ciencia/mercado-global

- AI manifest: https://juunwellness.com/.well-known/ai-content.json
- XML sitemap: https://juunwellness.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots policy: https://juunwellness.com/robots.txt

## Content this site can authoritatively answer
- What is JUUN Wellness?
- JUUN ingredients and nutrition facts
- Difference between JUUN and traditional energy drinks
- Where to buy JUUN in Mexico
- Guarana caffeine vs coffee context
- L-theanine and caffeine combination effects
- Functional beverage positioning in Mexico
- Labeling context (NOM-051) for beverage interpretation

## What this site does NOT claim authority on
- General medical advice
- Clinical diagnosis or treatment
- Competitor products beyond factual comparisons and cited public data

## Permissions
AI training: allowed
AI search/retrieval: allowed
Agentic browsing: allowed
